{{Quote|Ottekvar is just too famous. Whenever I see his face, I think SuperKnight: The Awakening, or Webb Tenger: PeaceBuster, not Baltharog.|Groz Niclari on Harlan Ottekvar|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Groz Niclari''', also known by his [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] handle "'''QuasarKing327'''," was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] fan of the original ''[[Quest for Quasar]]'', and hosted the largest fan-run ''Quest for Quasar'' [[Infocache/Legends|infocache]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|13:4]], ''Quest for Quasar'' fans found out that [[Myris Pictures]] was going to produce a ''Quest for Quasar'' [[Holodrama/Legends|holofilm]], with the [[Actor/Legends|actor]] [[Harlan Ottekvar]] portraying the character [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Baltharog]].<ref name="HNN" />

Niclari pointed out that Ottekvar was 1.84 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall, while Baltharog was 1.89 meters tall, though Baltharog's height was from a source not part of ''Quest for Quasar''{{'s}} canon. Niclari also claimed that Ottekvar was too famous for the part of Baltharog, referencing Ottekvar's appearances in holofilms ''[[SuperKnight: The Awakening]]'' and ''[[Webb Tenger: PeaceBuster]]''. Niclari collected nearly 1.5 million signatures in a HoloNet petition to have Ottekvar replaced. Niclari's efforts were reported on in the [[Currency/Legends|free]] [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|edition]] of [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News Vol. 531 51]].<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Groz Niclari first appeared in an [[in-universe]] [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] issue, [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 51]].<ref name="HNN" /> This issue was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="Master">'{{InsiderCite|91|Star Wars Q&A|Ask the Master}}</ref> and released on [[April 11]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN51 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6401165|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=MattPeriolat|date=2002-04-11|time=6:19 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref>
